chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4307 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.19046/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 15.05.2025 M/s.Abdul Sattar Pirzada & Mamoon N, Choudhry, Advocates for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Syed Hakim Masood, F.I.D., DRAP Karachi is present. On the last date the following order was passed:- “08.05.2025 Mr.Mamoon N, Choudhry, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. Syed Hakim Masood, F.I.D., DRAP Karachi is present and places on record a letter dated 06th May, 2025 issued to the petitioner in respect of the subject controversy. Copy provided to learned counsel for the petitioner, who may seek instructions. To come up on 15.05.2025.” Today, learned counsel submits under instructions that the petitioner shall comply with the aforesaid letter and as a consequence thereof, this petition may be disposed of as having served its purpose. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
